summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Midnight Social app. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend flows 95% working. WebSocket real-time features have connectivity issues but core functionality is solid.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection failures on Who's Here page preventing real-time glance notifications and live user updates

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (15/15) - Registration, Login, Profile, Venues, Check-in, People, Connections, Notifications, Drink Tokens, Account Management
Landing page loads with correct buttons and navigation
User registration flow creates account and redirects properly
User login flow authenticates and navigates to venues
Venues page displays seeded venues with search functionality
Check-in to venue works and navigates to Who's Here page
Who's Here page displays venue information and back navigation
Navigation menu works between Venues, Connections, Settings pages
Connections page shows empty state correctly when no connections exist
Settings page profile update functionality works
Account deletion confirmation dialog works (tested with cancel)
Logout functionality redirects to landing page
UI elements (logo, user avatar) navigation works
Profile setup flow works (optional after registration)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket connectivity issues on Who's Here page. The WebSocket connections are failing which prevents real-time notifications for glances, drink tokens, and live user check-in/check-out updates. All other functionality is working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All core flows working, WebSocket real-time features failing
